description: readString rejects unclosed strings at EOF instead of silently consuming
steps: Check l.ch == 0 after readString loop exits — if true, emit TOKEN_ILLEGAL with 'unterminated string'

description: readNumber supports scientific notation (e/E with optional sign and exponent digits)
steps: After decimal/integer parsing in readNumber, check for e/E and consume exponent
Set token type to TOKEN_FLOAT for scientific notation literals

description: Mod() checks for zero divisor in int64 and uint64 cases
steps: Add if yv == 0 panic before xv % yv in int64 case
Add if yv == 0 panic before xv % yv in uint64 case

description: Div() detects MinInt64 / -1 overflow and panics with clean error
steps: Add overflow check after zero check in Div int64 case: if xv == math.MinInt64 && yv == -1

description: Negate() detects MinInt64 overflow and panics with clean error
steps: Add overflow check in Negate int64 case: if e == math.MinInt64
Panic with 'sloplang: cannot negate MinInt64: integer overflow'

description: codegen sanitizes Go keywords in user identifiers to prevent format.Source crash
steps: Add goKeywords set with all 25 Go keywords
Add sanitizeIdent(name) function that prefixes Go keywords with slop_
Apply sanitizeIdent at all ast.NewIdent call sites for user-defined names
Update 4 tests to expect success instead of compile error
Run full test suite: go test ./...

description: use-before-assign produces clean panic instead of SIGSEGV
steps: Add nil check to FormatValue: panic with 'variable used before assignment'
Add nil check to binaryOp: panic with 'variable used before assignment'
Remove t.Skip from TestAdv_ErrRecov_UnclosedStringThenValid (fixed by unclosed string fix)
Run full test suite: go test ./...
